File Age & Freshness

File age measurements show the distribution of file ages (days since the first commit) and the file freshness (days since the latest commit).

Summary
  • Number of files: 650
  • Daily file updates (only one update per file and date counted): 1875
  • First update: 2017-03-04
  • Latest update: 2026-04-28
  • Days between first and latest update: 3,342 (477 weeks, estimated 2,385 working days)
  • Active days (at least one file change): 872
